html:
Berries are Fruit Food Items that can be found on Berry Bushes. Berries restore 9.375 when eaten, and take 6 days to spoil. Juicy berries are the alternative of berries, and provide a faster rotting but larger quantity of food to snack on.

Roasted Berries

Roasted Berries are made by cooking Berries over any Fire. They restore 1 and 12.5 . Roasted Berries spoil twice as fast as regular Berries. Therefore, one shouldn't cook all berries at once (unless rotting), and instead, cook only the amount that will be eaten.

Both Berries and Roasted Berries can be used as ingredients in the Crock Pot, and count as half Fruit value.

Usage

Filler can't be Meats, Eggs, or Dairy

×4

Tips

  • Berries are excellent filler ingredients for recipes in the Crock Pot since they do not produce many dishes on their own.
  • Berry Bushes are very common in Grasslands making Berries a good source of food at the beginning of the game.
  • It's advisable not to pick too many berries while exploring, as carrots have faster picking animation than berries and will take more time to spoil.
  • Berry Bushes will not regrow picked berries during Winter.
  • Gobblers will eat Berries from Berry Bushes that have not yet been picked during the day time (or anywhere else they can find them).
  • Berries can be used as bait in Traps to catch Rabbits.
  • Manure can be farmed by leaving large stacks of Berries near Pig Houses. The Pigs will eat the Berries over time and turn it into Manure.
    • In absence of Pigs, Berries can be cooked to make them spoil faster to obtain Rot, to be used for fertilization.
  • In the Hamlet DLC, the price of berries at Swinesbury's Fine Grocers is 1 Oinc, and they can be sold to Ushers for 4 Oincs. Purchasing them whenever they become available ensures a small, steady stream of income.

Trivia

  • Wickerbottom states that berries are from an Ardisia crenata plant. These berries, while unconfirmed, are suspected to be poisonous.
  • Berries may be more specifically based on Redcurrants, because of the close proximity to each other on their stem and edibility.

Gallery

  • Original HD Berries icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Original HD Cooked Berries icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Berry as seen in the Summer promo for Reign of Giants.

“Red berries taste the best.”
–Wilson, when examining Berries.
“Red berries taste the best.”
–Willow, when examining Berries.
“Is tasty!”
–Wolfgang, when examining Berries.
“These berries are tart.”
–Wendy, when examining Berries.
“THEY REMIND ME OF BLOOD”
–WX-78, when examining Berries.
“Some Ardisia crenata berries, I think.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Berries.
“I have a heartier appetite than that.”
–Woodie, when examining Berries.
“Sigh. If I have to.”
–Maxwell, when examining Berries.
“Oh no. I couldn't possibly eat these.”
–Wagstaff, when examining Berries.
“Fruits. I dön't like 'em.”
–Wigfrid, when examining Berries.
“Juice sacks.”
–Webber, when examining Berries.
“These are the edible kind, right?”
–Walani, when examining Berries.
“Fresh fruit!”
–Warly, when examining Berries.
“Stains me blouse.”
–Woodlegs, when examining Berries.
“BERRIES PLUCK'D FROM YUMMY BUSH”
–Wilba, when examining Berries.
“Fills tummy”
–Wormwood, when examining Berries.
“Juicy little projectiles.”
–Wheeler, when examining Berries.
“A handful of loose berries.”
–Winona, when examining Berries.
“A handful of mortal treats.”
–Wortox, when examining Berries.
“Yummy shrub snacks!”
–Wurt, when examining Berries.
“They're not in the poisonous section of my handbook, must be safe!”
–Walter, when examining Berries.
“These will keep me going a while longer.”
–Wanda, when examining Berries.

“I don't think heat improved them.”
–Wilson, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Red berries with fire somehow taste even better.”
–Willow, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Is more tasty!”
–Wolfgang, when examining Roasted Berries.
“More balanced flavor, but they won't last long.”
–Wendy, when examining Roasted Berries.
“THEY HAVE LOST STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY”
–WX-78, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Roasted Ardisia crenata, just in case.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Tastes like warm berries.”
–Woodie, when examining Roasted Berries.
“A little more refined, at least.”
–Maxwell, when examining Roasted Berries.
“In theory I can digest this mush of fruit.”
–Wagstaff, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Warm red mush.”
–Wigfrid, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Warm juice sacks.”
–Webber, when examining Roasted Berries.
“They're all sticky now. Heh heh, gross.”
–Walani, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Could use a pinch of sugar...”
–Warly, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Could use a crust o'bread ta spread o'er.”
–Woodlegs, when examining Roasted Berries.
“WILBA BERRIES DOTH WARM'D”
–Wilba, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Slurpy”
–Wormwood, when examining Roasted Berries.
“They may be squishy but they'll still fly through the air.”
–Wheeler, when examining Roasted Berries.
“A bit charred in places, but I don't mind.”
–Winona, when examining Roasted Berries.
“I hear they last longer this way.”
–Wortox, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Why try to burn snacks, glort?”
–Wurt, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Well, now I have hot berries.”
–Walter, when examining Roasted Berries.
“Well, now they're kind of a hot mush...”
–Wanda, when examining Roasted Berries.

'''Roasted Berries''' are made by [[cooking]] Berries over any [[Fire]]. They restore 1 {{Hp}} and 12.5 {{Hunger}}. Roasted Berries [[Rot|spoil]] twice as fast as regular Berries. Therefore, one shouldn't cook all berries at once (unless rotting), and instead, cook only the amount that will be eaten.

=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Berries are excellent filler ingredients for recipes in the Crock Pot since they do not produce many dishes on their own.
* Berry Bushes are very common in [[Grasslands]] making Berries a good source of food at the beginning of the game.
* It's advisable not to pick too many berries while exploring, as [[Carrot|carrots]] have faster picking animation than berries and will take more time to spoil.
* Berry Bushes will not regrow picked berries during [[Winter]].
* [[Gobbler]]s will eat Berries from Berry Bushes that have not yet been picked during the day time (or anywhere else they can find them).
* Berries can be used as bait in [[Trap]]s to catch [[Rabbit]]s.
* [[Manure]] can be farmed by leaving large stacks of Berries near [[Pig House]]s. The [[Pig]]s will eat the Berries over time and turn it into Manure.
** In absence of Pigs, Berries can be cooked to make them spoil faster to obtain [[Rot]], to be used for [[Fertilizer|fertilization]].
*In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, the price of berries at Swinesbury's Fine Grocers is 1 [[Oinc]], and they can be sold to [[Pig Traders/Usher|Ushers]] for 4 Oincs. Purchasing them whenever they become available ensures a small, steady stream of income.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* [[Wickerbottom]] states that berries are from an ''[[Wikipedia:Ardisia crenata|Ardisia crenata]]'' plant. These berries, while unconfirmed, are suspected to be poisonous.
* Berries may be more specifically based on [[Wikipedia:Redcurrant|Redcurrants]], because of the close proximity to each other on their stem and edibility.
